headline: Anti-discrimination bill drafted covering 12 protected grounds
context: A coalition of 45 civil society organisations drafted a comprehensive anti-discrimination bill covering 12 protected grounds for parliamentary consideration in 2025.

cards.big: Civil society drafts anti-discrimination bill covering 12 protected grounds
cards.sub: Race, religion, gender, disability, age among proposed protected categories

cards.big: Malaysia has no comprehensive anti-discrimination legislation despite Article 8 guarantee
cards.sub: Bill proposes Equal Opportunities Commission with enforcement powers

cards.big: 134 countries worldwide have comprehensive anti-discrimination laws as of 2025
cards.sub: Malaysia is the only upper-middle-income nation in ASEAN without one

cards.big: 45 civil society groups collaborated for 18 months to produce the draft bill
cards.sub: Public consultation received 8,200 submissions supporting comprehensive legislation

cards.big: Without anti-discrimination law, constitutional equality is a promise without enforcement
Minister in PM's Department acknowledged the bill in February 2025 press conference
